articles.title: Sega Updates Sales Figures for Key Titles
articles.description: Sega's 2026 management meeting revealed updated sales for Metaphor: ReFantazio, Persona 3 Reload, and more. The presentation highlights the performance of current and upcoming projects.
articles.impact: Sega's sales insights could influence future game development.

articles.title: Apple Launches iOS 27 Beta 2 for Developers
articles.description: Apple has released the second beta of iOS 27 for developers, continuing its summer testing cycle. This update follows the first beta released after WWDC 2026.
articles.impact: Developers can now test new features in iOS 27.

articles.title: Valve Enables Custom Steam Machines with SteamOS
articles.description: Valve is expanding SteamOS compatibility to more desktop hardware, allowing users to build their own Steam Machines. This includes support for Nvidia graphics cards.
articles.impact: Users can now create personalized gaming setups.

articles.title: GTA 6 Price Leak Turns Out to Be False
articles.description: A rumored high price for GTA 6 caused fan outrage, but it has been debunked. The leak was based on incorrect information from a European retailer.
articles.impact: Fans can breathe easy about GTA 6 pricing.

articles.title: Ford Thunderbird's Infamous Oil Filter Location
articles.description: The Ford Thunderbird Super Coupe features a notoriously difficult oil filter placement, causing frustration among mechanics. This design choice has drawn criticism over the years.

articles.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Deal Ahead of Price Hike
articles.description: Woot is offering the Nintendo Switch 2 for $399, available to new customers. This deal comes before a scheduled price increase in September.
articles.impact: Consumers can save before the price increase.

articles.title: Google's Pixel to Feature 'Audio Memory'
articles.description: Google is developing 'Audio Memory' for Pixel phones, which will track important conversations throughout the day. This feature aims to enhance user experience.

articles.title: God of War Laufey's Long-Term Development Plans
articles.description: God of War Laufey has been part of Santa Monica Studio's plans since 2018, according to an interview with voice actor Deborah Ann Woll. The character's inclusion was intentional from the start.

articles.title: Google Photos to Introduce AI Editing Tool
articles.description: Google Photos is reportedly working on a new AI-powered editing feature called 'Moods' that will transform how users edit their photos. Early signs were found in the latest app version.
key_points: New AI editing tool in development
articles.impact: AI could redefine photo editing experiences.

articles.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Sparks Fan Debate
articles.description: A new video of Halo: Campaign Evolved's main menu has ignited discussions among fans regarding the level of detail in the Halo ring. Opinions vary widely on the design choices.
articles.impact: Fan feedback may influence future designs.

articles.title: Kingdom Hearts Collection Boxart Updated
articles.description: Square Enix has replaced the boxart for Kingdom Hearts Collection [1-3] following accusations of AI usage in the original design. The new artwork is gradually appearing at retailers.
articles.impact: Square Enix aims to maintain brand integrity.

articles.title: Protecting Seniors from Scam Texts
articles.description: Learn effective strategies to shield elderly parents from scam texts, including using iPhone Screen Time limits and carrier tools. These measures can prevent financial exploitation.
articles.impact: Effective measures can safeguard vulnerable seniors.

articles.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Deals for Prime Day
articles.description: Apple Watch Series 11 and Ultra 3 are available at new low prices during early Prime Day deals. Discounts start from $199, following the unveiling of watchOS 27.
key_points: Apple Watch discounts for Prime Day
articles.impact: Consumers can take advantage of significant savings.

articles.title: Unreal Engine Veteran Departs Epic Games
articles.description: Sjoerd De Jong, a veteran of Unreal Engine, has left Epic Games, citing industry changes. He emphasizes the need to adapt to a pivotal moment in gaming.
articles.impact: His departure signals significant industry shifts.

articles.title: Hyrox: The New Dating Scene
articles.description: Hyrox is emerging as a trendy venue for blind dates, combining fitness and social interaction. This trend emphasizes lifestyle compatibility among participants.
articles.impact: This trend reshapes modern dating experiences.
